description_long: This is a plush stuffed toy shaped like a round, chubby bird with a soft lavender body and head. The toy features a small yellow beak, two round black eyes, and fluffy, textured wings and a tail made from a different, shaggier material. Its feet are small and orange, positioned at the base of the body, and it has a tuft of fluffy material on top of its head. The overall surface appears velvety and smooth, with the wings and tail providing a contrasting, more textured look. A small fabric tag is attached near the bottom, likely for branding or care instructions.
description: A soft, lavender plush bird with a yellow beak, fluffy wings and tail, and orange feet. The toy has a round, cuddly shape and a tuft of fluff on its head.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bird's face, yellow beak, black eyes, and both fluffy wings.
description_view_1: Angled rear-side view highlighting the fluffy tail, side of the head, and one wing, with the tag visible.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full fluffy tail, both wings, and the tag at the bottom.
description_view_3: Angled rear-side view from the opposite side, showing the tail, one wing, and the side of the head.
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is neutral and friendly, with round black eyes and no visible mouth or eyebrows, giving it a calm and approachable appearance.
attribute_pose_or_posture: Sitting upright with its wings slightly out to the sides and feet positioned forward, the head is upright with a tuft of fluff on top.
